scripts.packages:check: bash -c 'pnpm --filter @family-events/contracts check && pnpm --filter @family-events/shared check && pnpm --filter @family-events/design-system check && pnpm --filter @family-events/email check'
scripts.packages:test: bash -c 'pnpm --filter @family-events/contracts test && pnpm --filter @family-events/shared test && pnpm --filter @family-events/design-system test'
scripts.workspace:test: node --test tests/guards/config-typescript.test.mjs tests/guards/config-quality.test.mjs tests/guards/workspace-layout.test.mjs tests/guards/packages-consumers.test.mjs tests/guards/shared-boundary.test.mjs tests/guards/url-validation-boundary.test.mjs tests/guards/cron-runner-boundary.test.mjs tests/guards/domain-boundaries.test.mjs tests/guards/ios-scope.test.mjs tests/guards/android-scope.test.mjs tests/guards/workspace-workflows.test.mjs tests/railway-cron-poc.test.mjs
scripts.verify:web: bash -c 'pnpm run docs:test && pnpm run workspace:test && pnpm run packages:check && pnpm run packages:test && pnpm run web:check && pnpm run web:test && pnpm run web:build'
scripts.verify:android: bash -c 'pnpm run android:check && pnpm run android:test && pnpm run android:build'
scripts.verify:full: bash -c 'pnpm run verify:web && pnpm run verify:ios && pnpm run verify:android'
scripts.db:advisors:security: bash scripts/supabase.sh db advisors --linked --type security --level warn --fail-on error
scripts.db:advisors:performance: bash scripts/supabase.sh db advisors --linked --type performance --level warn --fail-on none
scripts.db:types: bash scripts/supabase.sh gen types typescript --local --schema public > packages/contracts/src/database.types.ts
scripts.clean: turbo run clean && find . -name 'node_modules' -prune -o -name '.turbo' -print | xargs rm -rf
scripts.clean:dist: find apps packages -name 'dist' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + ; find apps packages -name 'build' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + ; find apps packages -name 'out' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} + ; find apps packages -name '.next' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -exec rm -rf {} +
